src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: [G12] Mixed multipart command: the File part is a MultipartFile; typed form-data parts carry their real Java types (String/enum/Integer), not MultipartFile.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: [G12] The File part binds via @RequestPart MultipartFile; typed form-data parts bind via typed @RequestParam (optional altText as String, required enum and primitive int). consumes=multipart/form-data; File size/contentType guards remain; no guard is emitted for non-File parts.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: storageCalls.put wiring still works with the mixed command: the File part feeds the storage port.
